name: Canopy Clans
core_philosophy: Value rots if it sits. Keep it moving.

geography.environment: The jungle is alive and restless
geography.defense: Constantly rebuild bridges, rotate leadership, and circulate currency

military.tactic: Fight in 3D. Never stand still (Static = Dead)

petrified_stone_root.source: Deep mines finding fossilized roots of Ancestor Trees
petrified_stone_root.use: Fireproof construction beams and heavy-duty gun stocks

green_slate_quarry.use: Waterproof roofing tiles and flagstones that resist moss

product.cull_skin: High-grade leather armor and luxury boots

musical_instruments_and_joinery.species: Large, six-limbed ant-folk with massive, articulate mandibles

product.void_lutes: Instruments with perfect resonance because they have no glue joints
product.precision_gun_furniture: Carve the intricate wooden fittings for the Tarsier's rifles
product.puzzle_boxes: Unsolvable wooden safes used by merchants

product.viper_haze: A smokeable combat drug (slows time perception)

poultry.yield: High-protein meat, massive eggs, and rigid feathers for arrows

ice_blood_tea.utility: A chemical coolant. Essential for factory workers in the [[Iron Caldera]] to prevent heatstroke
